mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by > 0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 280 in the CPIAUCSL series triggers central bank rate hikes that destabilize equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 280.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production (INDPRO) and decline in housing starts (HOUST) signals mixed supply-side dynamics that create volatility in equity markets, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO rises and HOUST falls.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real sales (RSAFS) combined with declining GDP growth (GDPC1) signals weakening demand conditions that depress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS declines and GDPC1 falls.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) during a high unemployment rate regime signals labor market recovery that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns are negative in > 50% of instances where PAYEMS rises and UNRATE exceeds 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts (HOUST) combined with stable inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals strong consumer demand that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in > 50% of instances where HOUST rises and CPIAUCSL remains stable.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) during a high capacity utilization regime signals overextension in supply chains that creates equity market volatility, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines and CPIAUCSL exceeds 280.
